claim_bullets.bullet_text: Spells may target only desired recipients; area-of-effect is optional. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.84-95)
Success roll lets caster pass through wall; failure blows them away. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.84-95)
Success roll allows passage with little wetness; failure results in being swallowed. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.84-95)
Example: allies hear spellsong for morale, enemies not advantaged. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.84-95)
Caster can control echoes of any sound within 30 m radius. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.84-95)

source_record_text: Spirit Magic List part 2 summarizes spirit-based spells, wall effects, and related mechanics from pages 84–95 of the Sword World RPG Complete Edition.
